title: Assistant Store Manager - Barista Global Group - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Barista Global Group - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Barista Global Group in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Barista Global Group:
Barista Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista Global Group!
